plugins.name: ios-device-operator
plugins.description: Operate iPhone and iPad (iOS/iPadOS) devices from Claude Code with pymobiledevice3: screenshots, syslog search, crash reports, file and app operations, developer services (DVT, tunnels, WebInspector, WDA) — works from a fresh workstation via uvx/PyPI or a local checkout.
